api_info.title: HipChat API
api_info.description: HipChat REST API v2 - Atlassian's deprecated team messaging and collaboration platform API. HipChat was sunset on February 15, 2019, replaced by Slack.

source.notes: Reconstructed from archived Atlassian developer documentation and open-source Go/Node.js client libraries. Original API docs at www.hipchat.com/docs/apiv2/ are no longer available.
